summary_one_line: Script tag must equal a Unicode-14/15 USE-shaper value (Old Uyghur/Tangsa/Toto/Vithkuqi/Kawi/Nag Mundari) to take the switch case at line 380.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: The 4-byte script tag dispatched by the switch on (hb_tag_t) planner->props.script must hold one of the Unicode-14.0/15.0 values whose case-arm falls through to line 380 (HB_SCRIPT_OLD_UYGHUR and siblings). The winner inputs supply a short header whose leading bytes (e.g. 75 0f 01 / 88 0f 01 / 80 0f 01 at offsets 0x00-0x02) drive props.script into that USE-shaper case group rather than the default/DFLT/latn arms.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: value_profile winner seeds carry a concentrated low-byte head pattern at offsets 0x00-0x02 (75/88/80 then 0f then 01) and are short (10-73 bytes); the CMP_MAP distance-bucket feedback rewards each input whose script-tag CMP operand gets closer to a target case constant, ratcheting props.script into the Old Uyghur case so the true branch is hit 26 times.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: value_profile_cmplog loser seeds are large (56-323 bytes) well-formed-looking sfnt tables beginning 00 01 00 00 with GSUB/GPOS directory tags; they resolve a chosen_script of DFLT/latn or an earlier (lower-Unicode) script case, never reaching the line-380 case group, and stay blocked for 22.10h.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient (Hamming/prefix distance-bucket feedback on the switch-dispatch CMP) incrementally rewards inputs whose script-tag operand approaches a line-380 case constant. The loser adds an input-to-state substitution stage on top, but that extra substitution diverts the mutation budget toward solving the GSUB/GPOS table-tag comparisons (the only literals it can lift from the corpus), pulling it away from the script-tag dispatch; the winning technique here is the CMP_MAP gradient, not the substitution stage.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocker is a switch-case dispatch on the script tag, with the blocked true side at the Old Uyghur Unicode-14.0 case group.
Line 380 case HB_SCRIPT_OLD_UYGHUR is the winner-only blocking branch side.
The line-380 case group is the Unicode-14.0/15.0 script set routed to the USE shaper, hit only by winner seeds.
Winner seeds carry a concentrated low-byte head pattern at offsets 0x00-0x02.
A winner seed begins 75 0f 01 and is short (19 bytes), found by value_profile.
Loser seeds are large well-formed-looking sfnt fonts beginning 00 01 00 00 with GSUB table tags.
At offset 0x0c winners hold low bytes while losers concentrate on 0x47 (the 'G' of GSUB/GPOS table tags).
The winner resolves the true branch 26 times while the loser hitcount is 0 and stays blocked 22.10h.
evidence_trail.cited_locator: Pair 1 avg hitcount / avg duration blocked

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile uses a CMP_MAP keyed by operand-distance bucket and rewards inputs whose CMP operands move closer to matching.
evidence_trail.exact_quote:
An input that produces a
CMP-operand pair closer to matching than any previously-seen pair
adds a new CMP_MAP bucket and is preserved as corpus.

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile_cmplog is the only involved fuzzer that adds I2SRandReplace on top of the CMP_MAP gradient.
The decisive pair delta is I2S, value_profile winning over value_profile_cmplog.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: Lineage verification is mandatory only for claimed_mechanism=I2SRandReplace. Here the winner is value_profile and the loser is value_profile_cmplog (I2S is the EXTRA technique the loser carries), so the winning technique is value_profile's CMP_MAP gradient, not I2S. The MECHANISM CONTEXT for value_profile states 'No `I2SRandReplace`' and that its CMP_MAP distance-bucket feedback preserves inputs whose CMP-operand pair is closer to matching; no dash-row lineage check applies to a non-I2S winner.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness with the same switch-on-tag dispatch where value_profile_cmplog resolves the line-380 case as fast as or faster than value_profile across trials, showing the added I2S substitution does not impede (or actively accelerates) reaching the script-tag case group.

weakest_evidence_point: The claim that I2S substitution actively diverts value_profile_cmplog's budget toward GSUB/GPOS tag comparisons is inferred from seed structure, not directly observed in lineage; the slowdown could instead be ordinary run-to-run variance amplified by the larger loser inputs.
